name: swaption_calib_then_price_atm
description: Synthetic swaption-vol calibrate-then-price integration fixture with flattened SABR and swaption outputs.

provenance.source_detail: Deterministic synthetic swaption integration fixture with flattened calibration and pricing outputs
provenance.regen_command: manual formula fixture; flattened outputs committed in fixture

source_validation.reason: Nested integration calibration contains final curve/parameter outputs but lacks executable quote/source instruments; this section is source-validation only while the pricing leg executes.
source_validation.required_for_execution: Add executable market quotes/source instruments and wire this integration fixture to the real calibration engine so calibration metrics are computed from residuals.

source_reference.non_compared_metrics_reason: Nested pricing leg keeps the Bloomberg swaption source NPV, but the executable pricing fixture has a documented corrected compounded-SOFR underlier residual.

source_validation.reason: Integration fixture contains source SABR/pricing outputs, but the nested calibration leg is source-validation and the nested swaption pricing leg is non-gating due to documented Bloomberg-vs-model residuals. Keep this non-gating until both legs execute like-for-like.
source_validation.required_for_execution: Reconcile the canonical pricing/calibration inputs and risk methodology to the external source, then remove this source_validation block so expected_outputs are compared by Rust and Python runners.

swaption_npv.tolerance_reason: Matches pricing/swaption/usd_swaption_5y_into_5y_receiver_25_otm.json Bloomberg SWPM tolerance. abs-or-rel: absolute/display tolerance is the intended comparison gate; relative tolerance is retained only as a legacy diagnostic.

swaption_vega.tolerance_reason: Matches pricing/swaption/usd_swaption_5y_into_5y_receiver_25_otm.json per-1pct normal-vol vega tolerance. abs-or-rel: absolute/display tolerance is the intended comparison gate; relative tolerance is retained only as a legacy diagnostic.
